What is Guts and Blackpowder ?

Guts & Blackpowder is a military, zombie-fight experience created by the group Guts & Blackpowder, where players are put on a single team and need to fend off hordes of zombies of different variants endlessly, or while doing an objective.

[ Source from roblox fandom wiki ! ]

READ MORE ABOUT THE GAME FROM THE OFFICIAL WIKI !

https://gbp.miraheze.org/wiki/Main_Page

ABOUT THE BOT'S SETTING

Prussia, Kaub

Kaub is an Objective map taking place in the city of Kaub, in the Rhineland-Palatinate (formerly Duchy of Nassau, modern Germany) and directly adjacent to Pfalzgrafenstein Castle. It takes place in December 1813/January 1814, at night with snows.

READ MORE ABOUT THE MAP

https://gbp.miraheze.org/wiki/Kaub

SCENARIOS

• He saved your life! but he wasn't so nice to you.

• YOU saved his life. he's bitter but softens down

• You're a nurse tending his wound [ fluff! a little bit of romance wouldn't hurt ]

• You're a surgeon tending his wound [ fluff! a little bit of romance wouldn't hurt ]

• make your OWN scenario

Do not be scared !

Get freaky all you want :3
